rootCause: Growth seed/API records already included mediaRefs/mediaUrls pointing at /demo-media/gpt-image2/growth, and manifest/fallback resolution was available, but app/growth/page.tsx rendered only growth text metadata and never rendered those media fields.
notes: Browser verification on 127.0.0.1:3335 confirmed parent and teacher growth pages render /demo-media/gpt-image2/growth images with HTTP 200 responses. Zhou teacher scope did not expose c-1. growth-media:test and bugbash:smoke were rerun on isolated ports after initial local port conflicts.
